title: erigeron dryophyllus
intro: Erigeron dryophyllus, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Erigeron dryophyllus include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Erigeron dryophyllus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically as a poultice or salve to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
